scripts.seo:test: node scripts/seo-opportunities.mjs --queries scripts/fixtures/search-console/queries.csv --pages scripts/fixtures/search-console/pages.csv --indexing scripts/fixtures/search-console/indexing.csv --out reports/seo-test-opportunities.md --json reports/seo-test-opportunities.json --backlog reports/seo-test-backlog.md --backlog-json reports/seo-test-backlog.json
scripts.build: ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 astro check && ASTRO_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 astro build
